$comment: Canonical hashes of the official froggy-trend-pullback composition artifacts (pipeline v1.3.0, EV3-GOV D-EV3-5(1)), computed by the afi-factory hasher (canonical-json-hashing.v1; domain tags per D-FCP-7). The artifacts are byte-identical copies of the afi-config@afiConfigCommit registry records; the values below equal the pins carried by the canonical analyst-strategy config/registration and the runtime composition provenance. Recomputed and asserted byte-equal by tests/official-artifacts.test.ts — downstream waves pin these values.
